basicInfo.title:
WRATH RELIEF
35% MILK CHOCOLATE WITH ASHWAGANDHA HERBS

features.title: THE ULTIMATE
features.desc: Experience the Wrath Relief Milk edition—the "Pleasure of a Pause" designed for those who prefer a creamier, smoother indulgence. This bar combines the comforting richness of 35% Milk Cocoa with the stress-dissolving properties of Ashwagandha to provide a powerful sense of "Ancient Calm" in every bite.

features.title: 35% MILK COCOA: CREAMY & SMOOTH
features.desc: With a 35% milk chocolate base, this slab offers a luscious, malt-like profile. The high milk solids provide a velvety texture that perfectly masks the earthy, botanical notes of the Ashwagandha Atibaladi infusion, making it an accessible treat for all.

features.title: THE
features.desc: More than just a treat, this is a functional powerhouse containing 20% of the Atibaladi formulation. Includes Ashwagandha for cortisol management, Atibala for resilience, and Bio-available Carriers (Ghee and Honey) to enhance absorption.

features.title: TRANQUIL
features.desc: The packaging serves as a visual cue for relaxation. The striking Gold combined with a Textured Blue finish signals premium quality and a calming effect, making it an ideal gift for professionals, students, or anyone navigating a high-stress lifestyle.

features.title: RESEARCH-DRIVEN MANIPAL HERITAGE
features.desc: Developed and manufactured by Cacobean Chocolate Factory at the Advanced Research Center (MUTBI), Manipal. This product bridges the gap between lab-tested precision and ancient wellness traditions.

details.quality: We offer free standard shipping on all contiguous product. Transit times are displayed at checkout when selecting shipping options. 60 day free returns and return shipping for these two regions. We also ship to the rest of the world for a reasonable shipping surcharge.

basicInfo.title:
WRATH RELIEF
55% DARK CHOCOLATE WITH ASHWAGANDHA HERBS

features.title: THE POWER OF
features.desc: In a world that never stops, Wrath Relief offers the "Pleasure of a Pause." By infusing premium dark chocolate with the stress-relieving properties of Ashwagandha, this bar is designed to help you unwind and reclaim your inner peace.

features.title: 20% ASHWAGANDHA ATIBALADI BLEND
features.desc: A functional wellness snack using a potent 20% concentration of an Atibaladi formulation. Includes Ashwagandha for stress management, Atibala for vitality, and a traditional infusion of Ghee and Honey for maximum absorption.

features.title: INTENSE 55% DARK COCOA
features.desc: The 80% chocolate base is crafted with 55% cocoa solids. This rich texture masks the earthy notes of Ashwagandha for a bold, bittersweet flavor profile.
Wrath Relief features a deep blue packaging chosen to evoke tranquility and relaxation—the perfect evening treat. It’s not just a snack; it’s a lifestyle upgrade for the modern soul.

features.title: SCIENCE-BACKED AYURVEDIC HERITAGE
features.desc: Developed at the Advanced Research Center (MUTBI) in Manipal, combining modern research with ancient wisdom to ensure every bar delivers both taste and function.

specs.desc: Contains Soy. May contain Milk traces.

basicInfo.title:
SMART SIN
35% MILK CHOCOLATE WITH BRAHMI HERBS

features.title: THE
features.desc: Indulge in a chocolate that works as hard as you do. Smart Sin combines the "Sin of Indulgence" with the "Wisdom of Brahmi," creating a snack that rewards your taste buds while fueling your brain. It is the ultimate guilt-free treat for the modern thinker.

features.title: 15% BRAHMI GHRITA COGNITIVE INFUSION
features.desc: Unlike standard supplements, our chocolate uses a traditional Ghrita (herbal ghee) preparation. This 15% infusion features a potent blend of Brahmi (Bacopa monnieri) for memory, Shankhapushpi & Vacha for concentration, and Trikatu for digestion.

features.title: SILKY 35% MILK CHOCOLATE BASE
features.desc: Comprising 85% of the bar, our premium milk chocolate provides a smooth, comforting vehicle for the herbal fats. The natural sweetness and rich milk solids perfectly balance the slightly bitter notes of Brahmi.

features.title: ENERGETIC
features.desc: The packaging stands out with a vibrant Red palette. Red represents the fire of the intellect (Buddhi) and the energy required for peak mental performance. It’s a striking, premium look that commands attention.

features.title: ANCIENT WISDOM, MANIPAL SCIENCE
features.desc: Crafted at the Cacobean Chocolate Factory within the Advanced Research Center (MUTBI), Manipal, this bar is the result of rigorous research into Ayurvedic bio-availability.

basicInfo.title:
Jatyadi Balm
Pure Ayurvedic Skin Repair Ointment

features.title: TRADITIONAL JATYADI FORMULATION
features.desc: Our Jatyadi Balm is based on the centuries-old Jatyadi Taila recipe, a cornerstone of Ayurvedic dermatology known for its remarkable skin-repairing properties.

features.title: NATURAL ANTISEPTIC & HEALING
features.desc: Infused with potent herbs like Neem, Karanja, and Patala, this balm acts as a natural antiseptic, helping to prevent infections and accelerate the healing of wounds, cuts, and rashes.

features.title: MULTI-PURPOSE SKIN RELIEF
features.desc: Effective against a wide range of skin issues including minor burns, eczema, psoriasis, and fungal infections, providing a versatile solution for family first aid.

features.title: CHEMICAL-FREE & NON-GREASY
features.desc: Crafted with pure Beeswax and herbal oils, our balm is free from mineral oils, parabens, and synthetic fragrances. It absorbs deeply without leaving a sticky residue.

features.title: AYURVEDIC HERITAGE, MODERN QUALITY
features.desc: Produced under strict quality controls at our Manipal facility, ensuring that traditional wisdom is preserved through modern safety standards.
